headline: Boeing pushes U.S. to look into EU loan to Airbus
summary: Investing.com -- Boeing has requested the U.S. government to push the European Union for details about a €3 billion ($3.43 billion) loan package to Airbus, according to a Reuters report Tuesday. The move brings back potential trade tensions after the two sides extended a tariff truce over jet subsidies.

headline: Emirates targets second-quarter 2027 delivery for Boeing 777-9 as certification nears (BA)
summary: Airline expects long-delayed aircraft to enter fleet next yearEmirates expects to receive its first Boeing (NYSE:BA) 777-9 aircraft during the second quarter of 2027, according to airline President Tim Clark, signalling that the programme is moving closer to its long-awaited entry into service. Speaking to reporters on Tuesday, Clark said the carrier is planning around deliveries next year as Boeing advances toward regulatory certification for the widebody aircraft.
